programme.desc: The authors show the fascinating bond between people and horses.Traveling around the world, they present their point of view on horse riding and the community that builds it.They will also hold meetings with top players.

Football: UEFA Europa League - Round of 16 match: VfB Stuttgart - FC Porto
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AZ Alkmaar - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase of the competition.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Juventus Turyn - Lech Poznań 16.09.2010 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Panathinaikos AO - AS Roma
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - FC Salzburg 30.09.2010 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Odense - Wisła Kraków 01.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Nottingham Forest FC - Ferencvárosi TC
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Wisła Kraków - Twente 14.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Juventus Turyn - Lech Poznań 16.09.2010 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Panathinaikos AO - AS Roma
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: Football: Italian league - match: AC Milan - Inter Milan
Football: Dutch league - match: NAC Breda - Feyenoord Rotterdam
Football: Italian league - match: Atalanta BC - Udinese Calcio
programme.desc: It's going to be a "Polish" match in Serie A. Nicola Zalewski and his colleagues from Atalanta and Udinese with Jakub Piotrowski and Adam Buksa will face each other.The latter defeated Fiorentina's goalkeeper in the previous round.It was his first goal this year.Improving the team's achievements against Bergamo will be an extremely difficult task.The Black and Blues will take to the pitch determined to make amends for the sensational 1-2 defeat against Sassuolo in the 27th series.On the other hand, the hosts can save themselves a bit before the match against Bayern in the Champions League on March 10.Will the Zebras be able to take advantage of this?

programme.title: Football: German League - match: FC St.Pauli - Eintracht Frankfurt
Football: Italian league - match: SSC Napoli - Torino FC

programme.desc: A program devoted to games from the main ATP Tour series.Fans will see, among others:announcements of upcoming tournaments.In addition, they will receive a portion of statistics and interesting facts, also from behind the scenes of the tennis world.

programme.title: Freeride
Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.desc: The authors show the fascinating bond between people and horses.Traveling around the world, they present their point of view on horse riding and the community that builds it.They will also hold meetings with top players.

Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles quarterfinal match
Football: German League - match: FC St.Pauli - Eintracht Frankfurt
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles quarterfinal match
Football: German League - match: 1. FC Köln - Borussia Dortmund
programme.desc: Borussia had their moment to join the fight for the championship when Bayern lost points in two games in a row.However, the key clash was the German derby, in which the Bavarians turned out to be better (3:2).Thus, the team from Dortmund is already eleven points behind the leader before the 25th round.In the next match, Niko Kovač's team will face 1. FC Köln.The Goats are not in the best shape and are getting closer to the relegation zone from match to match.This clash may have a significant impact on the balance of power in the lower part of the table.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells - singles quarterfinal match
Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

Men's basketball: ORLEN Basket Liga - match: Legia Warszawa - ORLEN Zastal Zielona Góra
Football: Saudi League - match: Al-Khaleej Club - Al-Nassr FC
programme.desc: There is a fierce fight for the title of Saudi Arabian champion.The differences between the teams on the podium are small.So every victory is worth its weight in gold.After 25 rounds, Al-Nassr is the leader, boasting a series of eleven league wins in a row.However, Jorge Jesus' players did not impress with their performance on the pitch in the previous round, and they secured three points against Neom SC only in the 95th minute of the match.Will Al-Khaleej's team be luckier than Christophe Galtier's team?

programme.title: ATP Magazine
programme.desc: A magazine with the most interesting matches from courts around the world.The most important matches and interviews with leading players, as well as a presentation of the best tennis players and their path to their careers.

programme.title: Football: Czech league
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Indian Wells
Men's basketball: ORLEN Basket Liga - match: King Szczecin - WKS Śląsk Wrocław
programme.desc: The hit of the 22nd round of the ORLEN Basket League, i.e. the leader of the table versus the team taking third place.Śląsk, apart from the mishap in the match against GTK Gliwice, looks great this year.King also has a very good record in the top league (seven wins, two losses).The inhabitants of Wrocław will probably start the competition with the inhabitants of Szczecin without Kadre Gray.One of the best players in the entire league is still struggling with an injury.Without him, it will be more difficult for Śląsk to defeat Wilki Morskie for the first time since March 2025.

programme.title: Boxing: Babilon Boxing Show in Żyrardów - light heavyweight: Paweł Stępień - Łukasz Stanioch 31/01/2025
Combat sports: UFC Fight Night - fight: Nassourdine Imavov - Caio Borralho 06/09/2025
programme.desc: Caio Borralho and Nassourdine Imavov will fight in the main event of the UFC gala in Paris.The Brazilian boasts a fantastic record.So far, he has fought seventeen professional fights, of which he lost only one - ten years ago.Imavov has sixteen wins and four losses.In addition to this fight, the main card of the competition included fights: Benoit Saint Denis with Mauricio Ruffy, Modestas Bukauskas with Paul Craig, Bolaji Oki with Mason Jones, Alex Soli with Rhys McKee and Patricio Pitbull with Losene Keita.Polish fans are waiting for the fights on the preliminary card between Marcin Tybura and Ante Delija, Robert Ruchała and William Gomis, as well as Robert Bryczek and Brad Tavares.

programme.title: K.O.TV Classics
programme.desc: A reminder and analysis of the greatest boxing fights in the history of this sport.It presents, among others:memorable fights.

programme.title: Combat sports: Hybrid MMA 8 in Rewal - May 9, 2025
Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.

Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Combat sports: FEN 53 in Lubin - fight: Cezary Oleksiejczuk - Bauyrzhan Kuanyshbayev 16/03/2024
Ninja vs. Ninja
programme.desc: The new season of the program promises competition at the highest level.However, the age of participants is lowering - even sixteen-year-olds will take part in this edition.They want to prove that experience does not necessarily always trump youthful zeal and enthusiasm.The Poland versus the rest of the world formula was restored to the program.In this edition, Jan Tatarowicz has a chance to take away the title of best ninja from the previous season from Clément Gravier.The program will also feature runner-up Samuel Folsom and Isabella Folsom - winner of the Last Woman Standing title.These athletes are among the world's best today.Polish players will be supported by experienced leaders and coaches, including:Paweł Murawski, Krzysztof Orankiewicz, Grzegorz Matyszewski and Grzegorz Niecko.Special guests are also expected to participate, such as Piotr Żyła and Bartek Wrona.
